_meta.note: First real regression pins for the autopoietic meta-template. This exemplar introspects the LIVE repository (infrastructure/ subdirectory roster, pipeline.yaml DAG, PUBLIC_PROJECT_NAMES) and injects the numbers into its own manuscript via build_manuscript_metrics_dict. Every value below is re-derived by calling the real src.template_template.introspection functions on the repo root -- never hand-copied from a rendered ${token}. Two stability tiers are pinned: (1) the frozen pipeline.yaml DAG structure (declared 14 / default-full 10 / core-only 8) and the confidentiality-invariant public exemplar roster count (16) at tolerance 0; (2) the live infrastructure module_count (23) at abs_tolerance 2, following this exemplar's own convention (manuscript/AGENTS.md: rotating layout facts link to docs/_generated/COUNTS.md) -- the band catches a broken discovery (0, halved) or a large jump while tolerating single-module organic repo growth.

pipeline_stages_declared.reason: Number of stages declared in infrastructure/core/pipeline/pipeline.yaml. The manuscript states this as a literal 14 in AGENTS.md and injects it as ${pipeline_stages_declared} across the abstract, introduction, architecture, documentation, and security sections. Frozen structural count -> tolerance 0. Re-derived from the live report, not copied from prose.

pipeline_stages_default_full.reason: Stages in a default full run -- pipeline.yaml stages that carry none of the opt-in tags 'ebook', 'metadata', 'bundle', or 'archival' (10 of 14). AGENTS.md pins this as the literal (10); the abstract/architecture/security/documentation sections inject ${pipeline_stages_default_full}. Frozen -> tolerance 0.

pipeline_stages_core_only.reason: Stages in a --core-only run -- pipeline.yaml stages tagged 'core' AND NOT 'llm', excluding opt-in ebook/metadata publication stages (8 of 14). AGENTS.md pins the literal (8); the 04_results.md execution table injects ${pipeline_stages_core_only} as the effective-core-stages column for all three sampled exemplars. Frozen -> tolerance 0.

public_exemplar_roster_count.reason: Count of git-tracked public exemplars in infrastructure.project.public_scope.PUBLIC_PROJECT_NAMES. The manuscript injects the full roster as ${public_exemplar_list} (abstract, introduction, architecture, appendix-exemplars) and discover_projects(public_only=True) returns exactly this set. The roster is a confidentiality invariant (only these names may ever reach the public DOI), so its size is a hard, frozen claim -> tolerance 0. Re-derived via public_project_names(root), not copied from prose (the appendix prose 'currently nine workspaces' is stale and deliberately NOT pinned).

module_count.reason: Count of infrastructure/ subdirectories returned by discover_infrastructure_modules (23 at pin time). This is the single most-cited introspection number in the manuscript (${module_count} appears in the abstract, introduction, architecture, results, quality, scalability, infrastructure-modules, ai-collaboration, and appendix-docs sections). It is a LIVE count that legitimately drifts as the repo grows, so per this exemplar's own convention (manuscript/AGENTS.md defers rotating layout facts to docs/_generated/COUNTS.md) it is pinned with abs_tolerance 2: wide enough to survive adding one infra module, tight enough to fail loudly on a broken discovery (0, a halving) or a large structural jump.

pipeline_stages_declared.claim_text: a YAML-declared pipeline (${pipeline_stages_declared} stages; default full ${pipeline_stages_default_full}) ... `${pipeline_stages_declared}` | YAML stage count (16)
pipeline_stages_declared.refresh_reason: Live re-derivation via template_template.introspection.build_infrastructure_report found 16, not the pinned 14 (frozen tolerance 0) — pipeline.yaml legitimately grew 2 stages since 2026-07-01; manuscript AGENTS.md prose also referenced the stale literal 14 and was not updated here (out of scope for a pin refresh).

pipeline_stages_default_full.claim_text: default full runs use ${pipeline_stages_default_full} stages ... `${pipeline_stages_default_full}` | Default full run (10)

pipeline_stages_core_only.manuscript_section: manuscript/04_results.md / Multi-Project Pipeline Execution table, manuscript/AGENTS.md / pipeline-stages token table

public_exemplar_roster_count.claim_text: an empirical evaluation across the canonical exemplar projects under `projects/templates/` (${public_exemplar_list}) ... The full public exemplar roster is: ${public_exemplar_list}.
public_exemplar_roster_count.refresh_reason: public_project_names() returns 18 (template_autoscientists and template_pools_rules_tools were added to PUBLIC_PROJECT_NAMES since the 2026-07-01 pin at 16).

module_count.claim_text: a Two-Layer Architecture that separates ${module_count} infrastructure subdirectories ... All ${module_count} enumerated subdirectories carry Tier-1/README.md and Tier-2/AGENTS.md coverage
module_count.refresh_reason: discover_infrastructure_modules() returns 28, outside the ±2 drift band around the 2026-07-01 pin of 23 — organic infrastructure/ growth over 6 days, not a broken-discovery signal (0 or halved). Band re-centered on the live count.
